import React, { useEffect } from 'react'; import { useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom'; import { updateSeo } from '../../utils/seoHelper'; import styles from './Home.module.css'; import { FaCode, FaRocket, FaShieldAlt, FaCheckCircle, FaLaptopCode, FaChartLine, FaUsers, FaMobileAlt, FaDatabase, FaCloud, FaCogs } from 'react-icons/fa'; function Home() { const navigate = useNavigate(); useEffect(() => { updateSeo({ title: 'Kognivex | Engineering Scalable Digital Future', description: 'Custom web apps, SaaS platforms, and enterprise solutions built for the modern era. We combine elite engineering with premium design.', }); }, []); return (
{/* HERO SECTION */}

Elite Engineering for Your Digital Ambition

We build high-performance SaaS platforms, custom enterprise systems, and scalable web applications that drive real business growth.

{/* CORE SERVICES */}

Our Core Services

Specialized engineering solutions designed to solve complex business challenges.

Custom Web Apps

High-performance, scalable web platforms built with modern architectures like React and Node.js.

Mobile Development

Native and cross-platform mobile solutions designed for speed, security, and exceptional UX.

SaaS Architecture

End-to-end multi-tenant platform engineering focused on scalability and global delivery.

Enterprise Systems

Complex back-office automation, ERP integrations, and data-driven management tools.

Cloud Solutions

AWS/Azure infrastructure management and zero-downtime deployment strategies.

Cyber Security

Enterprise-grade security audits and robust data protection implementations.

{/* WHY CHOOSE US */}

Why Partners Choose Kognivex

We combine deep technical expertise with a relentless focus on business outcomes.

Elite Standards

We follow world-class engineering practices to ensure your code is clean, maintainable, and scalable.

Data-Driven

Every architectural decision is backed by performance data and strategic business objectives.

Partnership First

We don't just build for you; we build with you, serving as an extension of your engineering team.

{/* HOW WE WORK (PROCESS) */}

Our Workflow

A proven, agile process to take your project from concept to global production.

1

Requirement Analysis

Deep-dive into your objectives and technical constraints.

2

Strategic Planning

Architecting the roadmap and technology stack selection.

3

Agile Development

Iterative builds with continuous feedback and testing.

4

Quality Assurance

Rigorous security and performance auditing before launch.

5

Elite Deployment

Seamless transition to production with 24/7 monitoring.

{/* TESTIMONIALS */}

Client Feedback

Trusted by ambitious startups and global enterprises.

"Kognivex transformed our legacy architecture into a high-performance SaaS platform. Their engineering standards are truly elite."

Sarah Jenkins

CTO, FinTech Global

"The most reliable technical partner we've worked with. They delivered our MVP two weeks ahead of schedule without sacrificing quality."

David Chen

Founder, ScaleUp Labs

"Deep technical expertise combined with a sharp product sense. Kognivex is more than just a development agency."

Michael Ross

VP Engineering, CloudFlow

{/* TECHNOLOGIES */}

Technologies We Use

We leverage the most modern and scalable tech stack for every project.

React / Next.js Node.js / Express TypeScript Python / Django PostgreSQL MongoDB AWS / Azure Docker / K8s
{/* CTA SECTION */}

Ready to Build Your Digital Future?

Contact our engineering team today for a free consultation and project roadmap.

); } export default Home;
